title: Transformers Architecture IR — ModularGraph v0
description: Library-wide modular inheritance forest: which architectures are linked (parent/child) via their modular_<name>.py, for a quick reference of which models share a lineage and align cleanly for comparison. See SPEC.md.

roots.description: Base 'spine' models (no modular parent) that have at least one descendant, most-descendants first.

nodes.description: Map of model name -> its place in the modular forest. Isolated standalones (no parent, no children) are omitted.

extends.description: Dominant parent model this one inherits from via its modular file, or null for a spine root.

parents.description: All parent models referenced (a modular file may inherit classes from several).

children.description: Models whose dominant parent is this node.

root.description: Transitive top ancestor. Models sharing a root are in the same lineage (align cleanly for comparison).

depth.description: Number of hops from this node to its root.

diff_size.description: Modularity metric vs the dominant parent; null for spine roots / standalone parents.
